personal.name: Allsandra Camacho
personal.title: Frontend Developer
personal.tagline: Building accessible, performant web experiences with React, TypeScript, and modern CSS.

about.bio: I'm a frontend developer passionate about crafting user interfaces that are both beautiful and accessible. I specialize in React, TypeScript, and modern CSS, with a keen eye for performance optimization and responsive design. I believe great software is built at the intersection of clean code and thoughtful UX.

experience.role: Frontend Developer, GUI Editor & Layout Artist
experience.description: Working as a frontend developer, GUI editor, and layout artist for various projects within the school and affiliated organizations.
highlights: Designed and implemented user-friendly web interfaces and layouts for organizational use
Created engaging graphic layouts and graphical user interfaces (GUI)

experience.company: Department of Information and Communications Technology (DICT)
experience.description: Actively participating in various DICT training programs, both online and face-to-face, to enhance technical skills and stay updated with modern technologies.
highlights: Completed comprehensive DICT training sessions covering modern tech stacks
Continuously engaging in ongoing training to further develop capabilities

experience.description: Led the video editing and post-production for an infomercial contest entry during university days.
highlights: Won 1st Place in the university-wide Infomercial Contest
Managed the complete editing process, ensuring high-quality visual and audio presentation

projects.title: E-Commerce Dashboard
projects.description: A real-time analytics dashboard for e-commerce businesses, featuring interactive charts, sales tracking, and inventory management.

projects.title: Design System
projects.description: A comprehensive component library and design system built with React and Storybook, used across multiple products.

projects.title: Task Management App
projects.description: A collaborative project management tool with real-time updates, drag-and-drop boards, and team workspaces.

projects.title: Weather Application
projects.description: A beautifully designed weather app with location-based forecasts, interactive maps, and severe weather alerts.

projects.title: Portfolio Generator
projects.description: A tool that generates developer portfolios from JSON data, featuring multiple themes and responsive layouts.

projects.title: Blog Platform
projects.description: A modern blogging platform with markdown support, syntax highlighting, and SEO optimization.

testimonials.quote: Allsandra delivered an exceptional dashboard that transformed how our team views data. Her attention to accessibility and performance was outstanding.
testimonials.author: Sarah Mitchell

testimonials.quote: Working with Allsandra was a pleasure. She brought our designs to life with pixel-perfect accuracy and suggested improvements we hadn't considered.
testimonials.author: James Park

testimonials.quote: The component library Allsandra built has become the foundation of our entire product line. It saved us hundreds of hours of development time.
testimonials.author: Maria Garcia

collaborators.name: Mia Santos
collaborators.note: Provided strategic guidance on visual hierarchy and accessibility across interface patterns.

collaborators.note: Collaborated on responsive layouts, performance tuning, and cross-browser polish.
